name: family-ledger-google-sheets
description: Google Sheets client tooling for family-ledger

scripts.check: eslint AConstants.js AEntity.js AccountsSheet.js Api.js App.js Balance.js BalancesSheet.js DoctorIssues.js Filters.js ImporterDialogs.js LedgerSync.js ManagedSheet.js Perf.js Settings.js SheetLayout.js SheetSettings.js Sidebar.js Transaction.js
scripts.push: for f in .clasp.local.json .clasp.syniukas.json; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then clasp push --force --project "$f"; fi; done
